title: Night of the Suiderkruis Stars: Great Brak River’s cabaret extravaganza lights up 2025!
description: ENTERTAINMENT NEWS AND VIDEO - Get ready for...
bodyText:
Video

ENTERTAINMENT NEWS AND VIDEO - Get ready for a dazzling night of music, laughter and community spirit at the Night of the Suiderkruis Stars cabaret at De Dekke Restaurant.

Proudly sponsored by Suiderkruis Security, this annual cabaret supports Caws 4 Paws and Child Welfare South Africa and this year the lineup includes South African superstar, Jannie Moolman!


> Book your tickets now for 29 or 30 May and join the sparkle under the Southern Cross!


Great Brak River is about to shine brighter than ever when the De Dekke Restaurant is transformed into a glittering stage of music, dance, and comedy.

This benefit concert is the hottest ticket in town, so grab your ticket now.


> Star-studded line-up to steal the show


This year’s Night of the Suiderkruis Stars promises a constellation of talent that’ll leave you starry-eyed.

Directed by the sensational Petronel Baard, whose voice alone is worth the ticket price, the 2025 line-up is packed with local legends and dazzling newcomers:

- Jannie Moolman: The headliner whose powerhouse vocals will light up the night sky.
- Zanah-Lee Stanley: Back by popular demand, ready to steal your heart.
- Anton Bouwer: That deep, soul-shaking bass you’ll be talking about for weeks.
- Will Lass & Breyten Treurnicht: Fresh faces with undeniable star power.
- Franco Engelbrecht & Band: Featuring Jewlin Jonkers on drums and Eckardt Muller on bass, delivering a sound that’s pure magic.
- Lirian Alencar-Marx: Igniting the stage with sizzling Latin Fusion.
- Lirian & The Grannies (Lettie Swanepoel & Cesserien Booyens): Guaranteed to have you laughing till your sides ache.
- The Stardust Ladies: Dazzling dance moves that’ll leave you in awe.
- Elvis (Feff Gerricke) & Marilyn (Wendy Malan): The glamorous duo making a show-stopping comeback.
- Dave Robbins as ‘The Old Man in Black’: Local comedy legend bringing the laughs.
- Plus surprise acts to keep you guessing!

Petronel Baard


> Event details you need to know


- When: 29 and 30 May
- Time: Doors open at 17:00 and the show starts at 19:00
- Where: De Dekke Restaurant, Great Brak River
- Dining: De Dekke’s mouthwatering dinner specials will be available
- Tickets: Book online at Book tickets for Cabaret 2025: Suiderkruis Stars


> Why you can’t miss this cabaret


From Jannie Moolman’s soaring notes to Dave Robbins’ side-splitting comedy, this cabaret is a rollercoaster of emotions. Whether you’re swaying to soulful tunes, laughing at the Grannies’ antics, or cheering for the Stardust Ladies’ dance moves, there’s something for everyone.

Plus, you’ll be supporting two incredible causes while enjoying a night of pure entertainment.

VIDEO: Jannie Moolman en Petronel Baard spandeer 'n aand onder die Suiderkruis sterre


> Dress to impress


The theme is Night of the Suiderkruis Stars, so think glamorous, starry, and fabulous! Feathers, sequins, and bold outfits are highly encouraged - let’s make Great Brak River sparkle brighter than the Southern Cross itself!

Dance, sing and laugh under the Southern Cross at the Night of the Suiderkruis Stars Cabaret!

Fef

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
